title: achillea alpina subsp. alpina
intro: Achillea alpina subsp. alpina, also known as Alpine Yarrow or White Yarrow, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, with its leaves and flowers containing essential oils and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Achillea alpina subsp. alpina include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Achillea alpina subsp. alpina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory problems.
